title: UK Company Intelligence MCP Input
description: Input for a single company lookup. Provide either a company name or a Companies House registration number.

query.title: Company name or registration number
query.description: UK company name (e.g. 'Tesco PLC') or Companies House registration number (e.g. '00445790' or 'SC123456'). Names are searched; numbers are looked up directly.

websiteUrl.title: Website URL (optional)
websiteUrl.description: Known website URL for the company (e.g. 'https://monzo.com'). If provided, skips domain inference. robots.txt is always checked before any scraping.
